title: MSTest / Microsoft.Testing.Platform testconfig.json
description: Configuration file consumed by Microsoft.Testing.Platform (MTP) and MSTest. The file is named 'testconfig.json' (or '<AssemblyName>.testconfig.json' once it is copied next to the test executable). See https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/testing/unit-testing-mstest-configure.

$schema.description: Reference to this JSON schema, enabling editor completion and validation.

environmentVariables.description: Environment variables to apply to the test host process. Mirrors the <EnvironmentVariables> element of legacy .runsettings. Declaring at least one entry opts the run into the test host controller process model. Do not store secrets here.

mstest.description: MSTest-specific settings. This is the JSON equivalent of the <MSTest> (or <MSTestV2>) section of a .runsettings file.

timeout.description: Timeouts (in milliseconds) for tests and fixture methods.

test.description: Default timeout, in milliseconds, applied to every test method. Must be a strictly positive integer; a value of 0 or less is rejected with a warning and ignored. Omit this key to use the default (no timeout).

assemblyInitialize.description: Timeout, in milliseconds, for [AssemblyInitialize] methods. Must be a strictly positive integer; a value of 0 or less is rejected with a warning and ignored. Omit this key to use the default (no timeout).

assemblyCleanup.description: Timeout, in milliseconds, for [AssemblyCleanup] methods. Must be a strictly positive integer; a value of 0 or less is rejected with a warning and ignored. Omit this key to use the default (no timeout).

classInitialize.description: Timeout, in milliseconds, for [ClassInitialize] methods. Must be a strictly positive integer; a value of 0 or less is rejected with a warning and ignored. Omit this key to use the default (no timeout).

classCleanup.description: Timeout, in milliseconds, for [ClassCleanup] methods. Must be a strictly positive integer; a value of 0 or less is rejected with a warning and ignored. Omit this key to use the default (no timeout).

testInitialize.description: Timeout, in milliseconds, for [TestInitialize] methods. Must be a strictly positive integer; a value of 0 or less is rejected with a warning and ignored. Omit this key to use the default (no timeout).

testCleanup.description: Timeout, in milliseconds, for [TestCleanup] methods. Must be a strictly positive integer; a value of 0 or less is rejected with a warning and ignored. Omit this key to use the default (no timeout).

useCooperativeCancellation.description: When true, MSTest uses cooperative cancellation for timeouts instead of aborting the thread. Defaults to false.

randomizeTestOrder.description: When true, randomizes the order in which tests run. Defaults to false. Mutually exclusive with 'orderTestsByNameInClass'.

randomTestOrderSeed.description: Seed used when 'randomizeTestOrder' is true, to make the randomized order reproducible.

mapInconclusiveToFailed.description: When true, inconclusive test outcomes are reported as failures. Defaults to false.

mapNotRunnableToFailed.description: When true, not-runnable test outcomes are reported as failures. Defaults to true.

treatDiscoveryWarningsAsErrors.description: When true, warnings raised during test discovery are treated as errors. Defaults to false.

considerEmptyDataSourceAsInconclusive.description: When true, a data-driven test whose data source yields no rows is reported as inconclusive instead of failing. Defaults to false.

launchDebuggerOnAssertionFailure.description: Controls whether the debugger is launched when an assertion fails.

executionApartmentState.description: COM apartment state used to run tests. Defaults to MTA. STA is only honored on Windows.

disableAppDomain.description: When true, disables AppDomain creation (.NET Framework only). Defaults to false.

collectSourceInformation.description: When true, source file and line information is collected during discovery. Defaults to true.

orderTestsByNameInClass.description: When true, tests within a class run in alphabetical order by name. Defaults to false. Mutually exclusive with 'randomizeTestOrder'.

enabled.description: When true, enables test parallelization. Defaults to false.

workers.description: Number of worker threads used for parallelization. 0 means use the number of logical processors.

scope.description: Granularity at which tests are parallelized. Use 'class' to run classes in parallel or 'method' to run individual methods in parallel.

captureTrace.description: Controls how Console, Debug and Trace output produced during test execution is handled. Accepts a boolean (true = 'Result', false = 'None') for backward compatibility, or one of the modes: 'None' (discard), 'Result' (capture into the test result, the default), 'Live' (capture into the test result and additionally echo it live to the console as the test runs, similar to xUnit's showLiveOutput). Defaults to 'Result'.

enabled.description: When true, deployment is enabled. Defaults to true.

deployTestSourceDependencies.description: When true, dependencies of the test source are deployed. Defaults to true.

deleteDeploymentDirectoryAfterTestRunIsC.description: When true, the deployment directory is deleted after the test run completes. Defaults to true.

assemblyResolution.description: Additional directories probed when resolving test assembly dependencies (.NET Framework only).

path.description: Directory to probe. Environment variables (for example %HOMEDRIVE%) and relative paths are supported.

includeSubDirectories.description: When true, subdirectories of 'path' are also probed. Defaults to false.

orderTestsByNameInClass.description: Deprecated. Use 'execution.orderTestsByNameInClass' instead. When true, tests within a class run in alphabetical order by name. Defaults to false. Mutually exclusive with 'execution.randomizeTestOrder'.

resultDirectory.description: Directory where test results are written.

currentWorkingDirectory.description: Working directory of the platform process.

testHostWorkingDirectory.description: Working directory of the test host process.

exitProcessOnUnhandledException.description: When true, the process exits when an unhandled exception is observed. Defaults to false.

isDevelopmentRepository.description: Marks the repository as a development repository for telemetry purposes.

waitConnectionTimeoutSeconds.description: Seconds to wait for the test host to connect to the named pipe server.

connectTimeoutSeconds.description: Seconds to wait for the named pipe client to connect.
